allow: Bash(python3 -c " import sys, json lines = sys.stdin.read\(\).strip\(\).split\('\\n'\) for line in lines: try: obj = json.loads\(line\) role = obj.get\('role',''\) content = obj.get\('content',''\) if isinstance\(content, str\) and len\(content\) > 50: print\(f'[{role}]: {content[:300]}'\) print\('---'\) elif isinstance\(content, list\): for block in content: if isinstance\(block, dict\) and block.get\('type'\) == 'text': print\(f'[{role}]: {block[\\"text\\"][:300]}'\) print\('---'\) except: pass ")
